metadata.description: Private GitHub Copilot plugin marketplace for development workflow skills

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Structured development workflow skills for implementing features, fixing vulnerabilities, and upgrading dependencies — with branch management, Opus review, and automated maintenance.

plugins.name: dt-style-guide
plugins.description: Dynatrace corporate style guide enforcement: terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, and formatting rules for product docs, Epics, PRDs, and ARDs.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Nine skills (wiki-init, wiki-ingest, wiki-scan, wiki-query, wiki-save, wiki-lint, wiki-hot, wiki-tags-refresh, wiki-schema) for ingesting, querying, saving, linting, and managing a persistent wiki compiled from meetings, projects, and daily notes.
